texts.label: text
texts.orig: Nestled within the breathtaking landscape of Maasai Mara (Siana Conservancy), Mara Enkaji stands as a luxurious boutique resort, offering an unparalleled fusion of opulence and eco-conscious living. Translating to 'home' in Maasai, Mara Enkaji embodies the essence of being your haven amidst the wild beauty of the world's eighth wonder. Our resort is designed to provide an exhilarating stay while prioritizing environmental sustainability. From the moment you arrive, you're greeted by serene vistas that stretch as far as the eye can see, offering a glimpse into the untamed majesty of the Maasai Mara.

texts.orig: By placing a booking for travel during this period, the Tour Operator shall be deemed to have accepted the above mentioned Terms & Conditions for that booking, including any changes from the contracted agreement between the Tour Operator and Mara Enkaji, such changes being at the discretion of Mara Enkaji from time to time.

table_cells.text: Bed, Breakfast, Lunch, Hi-Tea & Dinner Soft Drinks taken during lunch & dinner Usage of Swimming Pool, WiFi & In-house Excursion

Game Drives (Package Available from Nairobi) Park & Conservancy Fees All additional Guest Experiences as otherwise listed Safari Shop purchases, In-Room massages, Spa Usage & Sauna Air and Road Transfers from elsewhere within the Masai Mara N.R(available upon request) Gratuities
Check in from 12:00 Hrs Check out by 10:00 Hrs At Mara Enkaji early check-in and late check-out subject to availability

Children of all ages are welcome Children under 3 years of age - Stay free of charge 4 - 12 Years Sharing with 1 or 2 adults - 50% of the per person sharing in a twin Kids sharing on own room - 75% of the room rate

100% cancellation fees will be charged on bookings cancelled within 60 days prior to travel
